---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new disease class, crop, language, or app feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why would this feature be useful? Who would benefit?

**Example:** *"Jute is a major crop in the Murshidabad district and late blight can devastate yields. Adding a jute disease class would help farmers there."*

## Proposed Solution

If you have an idea of how to implement this, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context

- If requesting a **new disease class**: please link to image sources and describe symptoms.
- If requesting a **new language**: please confirm you can help with translation.
- If requesting a **new feature**: attach mockups if possible.
